extraction.one_line_summary: VANDERHORN Jakko (Roompot) won Stage 3 by attacking while breakaway companions watched MAHARICH, exploiting focus on the jersey competition.
tactical_patterns: VANDERHORN exploited MAHARICH jersey calculation paralysis in final 500m while DE BIE tracked wrong wheel, revealing breakaway sprint psychology.
Roompot executed structured breakaway pacing: two-minute turns early, then accelerated at 70km mark with one-minute rotations into final 30km.

rider_signals.VANDERHORN Jakko: positive: 24-year-old ProContinental rider decisively beat WorldTour sprinters by timing attack when they fixated on jersey contender
rider_signals.MAHARICH Matej: negative: allowed jersey bonus calculation to distract from stage win, got marked heavily but failed to convert attention
rider_signals.DE BIE Sean: negative: marked MAHARICH instead of VANDERHORN despite being fastest breakaway rider, tactical error cost podium position
